sentences.target: Die Mehrwertsteuer ist schon im Preis drin.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈmeːɐ̯vɛʁtˌʃtɔʏ̯ɐ ɪst ʃoːn ɪm pʁaɪ̯s drɪn/

translations.de: Die Mehrwertsteuer ist schon im Preis drin.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈmeːɐ̯vɛʁtˌʃtɔʏ̯ɐ ɪst ʃoːn ɪm pʁaɪ̯s drɪn/
translations.en: The VAT is already included in the price.
translations.es: El IVA ya está incluido en el precio.
translations.fr: La TVA est déjà incluse dans le prix.
translations.it: L’IVA è già inclusa nel prezzo.
translations.zh-Hans: 增值税已包含在价格中。
translations.yue: 增值稅已包含在價錢內。
translations.pt: O IVA já está incluído no preço.
translations.vi: VAT đã bao gồm trong giá.
translations.ar: ضريبة القيمة المضافة مشمولة بالفعل في السعر.
translations.nl: De btw zit al in de prijs.
translations.hu: Áfa már benne van az árban.
translations.hi: वैट पहले से ही कीमत में शामिल है.
translations.pl: VAT jest już wliczony w cenę.
translations.el: Ο ΦΠΑ περιλαμβάνεται ήδη στην τιμή.
translations.nb: MVA er allerede inkludert i prisen.
translations.ro: TVA este deja inclus în preț.
translations.da: Moms er allerede inkluderet i prisen.
translations.ja: 消費税はすでに価格に含まれています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular marking the subject noun.
Common noun; subject (fem. sg. nom.); refers to value-added tax.
Copula; 3rd person singular present linking the subject to the predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating prior inclusion.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’); introduces a dative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘im’ (masc. sg. dat.).
Adverb functioning as a predicative complement meaning ‘inside/included’.

sentences.target: Ich rechne die Mehrwertsteuer im Kopf schnell aus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁɛçnə diː ˈmeːɐ̯vɛʁtˌʃtɔʏ̯ɐ ɪm kɔpf ʃnɛl aʊ̯s/

translations.de: Ich rechne die Mehrwertsteuer im Kopf schnell aus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁɛçnə diː ˈmeːɐ̯vɛʁtˌʃtɔʏ̯ɐ ɪm kɔpf ʃnɛl aʊ̯s/
translations.en: I calculate the VAT quickly in my head.
translations.es: Calculo el IVA rápido de cabeza.
translations.fr: Je calcule la TVA rapidement de tête.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在脑子里很快把增值税算出来。
translations.yue: 我喺腦入面好快計到增值稅。
translations.ru: Я быстро считаю НДС в уме.
translations.pt: Calculo o IVA rapidamente de cabeça.
translations.he: אני מחשב את המע״מ מהר בראש.
translations.vi: Tôi tính VAT nhanh trong đầu.
translations.ar: أحسب ضريبة القيمة المضافة بسرعة في رأسي.
translations.nl: Ik reken de btw snel uit in mijn hoofd.
translations.uk: Я швидко підраховую ПДВ у голові.
translations.hi: मैं दिमाग में वैट जल्दी से गणना करता हूँ.
translations.el: Υπολογίζω γρήγορα τον ΦΠΑ στο μυαλό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg regner ut MVA raskt i hodet.
translations.id: Saya cepat menghitung PPN di kepala.
translations.sv: Jag räknar ut momsen snabbt i huvudet.
translations.cs: Rychle si v hlavě vypočítám DPH.
translations.da: Jeg regner momsen hurtigt ud i hovedet.
translations.ja: 消費税を頭の中でさっと計算します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative subject.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular present. Part of separable verb ‘ausrechnen’ (particle appears clause-final).
Definite article; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object (fem. sg. acc.).
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’); introduces a dative PP indicating location (‘im Kopf’ = mentally).
Common noun; object of ‘im’ (masc. sg. dat.); figurative location.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb.
Separable verb particle forming ‘ausrechnen’ with ‘rechne’; clause-final position.

sentences.target: Auf der Rechnung fehlt die Mehrwertsteuer komplett.
sentences.reading: /aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈʁɛçnʊŋ feːlt diː ˈmeːɐ̯vɛʁtˌʃtɔʏ̯ɐ kɔmˈplɛt/

translations.de: Auf der Rechnung fehlt die Mehrwertsteuer komplett.
translations.ipa: /aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈʁɛçnʊŋ feːlt diː ˈmeːɐ̯vɛʁtˌʃtɔʏ̯ɐ kɔmˈplɛt/
translations.en: The VAT is missing from the invoice.
translations.es: En la factura falta el IVA.
translations.fr: Il manque la TVA sur la facture.
translations.ar: لا توجد ضريبة القيمة المضافة في الفاتورة.
translations.nl: Op de factuur ontbreekt de btw.
translations.el: Λείπει ο ΦΠΑ από το τιμολόγιο.
translations.ja: 請求書に消費税が記載されていません。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative here, introducing the locative PP.
Definite article; dative feminine singular with ‘Rechnung’.
Common noun; object of the preposition (fem. sg. dat.).
Intransitive main verb; 3rd person singular present. Takes the nominative subject after the verb (V2 order).
Definite article; nominative feminine singular marking the subject.
Common noun; subject (fem. sg. nom.).
Adverb intensifying the predicate ‘fehlt’.

sentences.target: Wir müssen die Mehrwertsteuer noch dazurechnen.

translations.de: Wir müssen die Mehrwertsteuer noch dazurechnen.
translations.en: We still have to add the VAT.
translations.es: Aún tenemos que sumar el IVA.
translations.fr: Il faut encore ajouter la TVA.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们还得把增值税算上。
translations.he: אנחנו עדיין צריכים להוסיף את המע״מ.
translations.vi: Chúng ta vẫn phải cộng thêm VAT.
translations.ar: ما زلنا بحاجة لإضافة ضريبة القيمة المضافة.
translations.nl: We moeten de btw er nog bij rekenen.
translations.hu: Még hozzá kell adni az áfát.
translations.hi: हमें अभी वैट जोड़ना बाकी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει ακόμα να προσθέσουμε τον ΦΠΑ.
translations.nb: Vi må fortsatt legge til MVA.
translations.sv: Vi måste fortfarande lägga på momsen.
translations.da: Vi skal stadig lægge moms på.
translations.ja: まだ消費税を足さないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative subject.
Modal auxiliary; 1st person plural present requiring an infinitive complement.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object (fem. sg. acc.).
Temporal/modal adverb indicating that the action is still/also to be done.
Infinitive of a separable verb (‘dazu’ + ‘rechnen’) appearing in fused form as the complement of the modal.

Ich rechne die Mehrwertsteuer im Kopf schnell aus.
Auf der Rechnung fehlt die Mehrwertsteuer komplett.
Wir müssen die Mehrwertsteuer noch dazurechnen.
